# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Response;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function show(Request $request)
    {
        $url = (string) $request->input('url', '');

        if ($url === '') {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Missing url'], 422);
        }

        $ch = curl_init();
        curl_setopt_array($ch, [
            CURLOPT_URL => $url,
            CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
            CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
            CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
            CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 10,
            CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 20,
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => false,
            CURLOPT_USERAGENT => 'LinkPreviewBot/1.0',
            CURLOPT_HEADER => true,
        ]);

        $raw = curl_exec($ch);

        if ($raw === false) {
            $err = curl_error($ch);
            curl_close($ch);
            return response()->json(['error' => $err], 502);
        }

        $status = (int) curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        $headerSize = (int) curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HEADER_SIZE);
        $contentType = (string) curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_CONTENT_TYPE);
        curl_close($ch);

        $headersRaw = substr($raw, 0, $headerSize);
        $body = substr($raw, $headerSize);

        if ($status < 200 || $status >= 300) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'Upstream error',
                'status' => $status,
            ], 502);
        }

        if ($contentType && stripos($contentType, 'text/html') === false) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'Unsupported content type',
                'content_type' => $contentType,
            ], 415);
        }

        $meta = $this->parsePreviewMeta($body, $url);

        return response()->json([
            'url' => $url,
            'final_url' => $this->extractFinalUrlFromHeaders($headersRaw) ?? $url,
            'status' => $status,
            'content_type' => $contentType,
            'title' => $meta['title'] ?? null,
            'description' => $meta['description'] ?? null,
            'image' => $meta['image'] ?? null,
            'site_name' => $meta['site_name'] ?? null,
        ]);
    }

    protected function parsePreviewMeta(string $html, string $baseUrl): array
    {
        $html = $this->limitString($html, 2_000_000);

        libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
        $doc = new \DOMDocument();
        @$doc->loadHTML($html, LIBXML_NOERROR | LIBXML_NOWARNING);
        libxml_clear_errors();

        $xpath = new \DOMXPath($doc);

        $getMeta = function (string $key): ?string {
            return null;
        };

        $meta = [];

        $meta['title'] = $this->firstNonEmpty([
            $this->queryMeta($xpath, 'property', 'og:title'),
            $this->queryMeta($xpath, 'name', 'twitter:title'),
            $this->queryTitle($xpath),
        ]);

        $meta['description'] = $this->firstNonEmpty([
            $this->queryMeta($xpath, 'property', 'og:description'),
            $this->queryMeta($xpath, 'name', 'twitter:description'),
            $this->queryMeta($xpath, 'name', 'description'),
        ]);

        $img = $this->firstNonEmpty([
            $this->queryMeta($xpath, 'property', 'og:image'),
            $this->queryMeta($xpath, 'name', 'twitter:image'),
            $this->queryLinkRel($xpath, 'image_src'),
        ]);
        if ($img) {
            $img = $this->absolutizeUrl($img, $baseUrl);
        }
        $meta['image'] = $img;

        $meta['site_name'] = $this->firstNonEmpty([
            $this->queryMeta($xpath, 'property', 'og:site_name'),
            $this->queryMeta($xpath, 'name', 'application-name'),
        ]);

        foreach ($meta as $k => $v) {
            if (is_string($v)) {
                $meta[$k] = trim(preg_replace('/\s+/u', ' ', $v));
                if ($meta[$k] === '') {
                    $meta[$k] = null;
                }
            }
        }

        return $meta;
    }

    protected function queryMeta(\DOMXPath $xpath, string $attr, string $value): ?string
    {
        $q = sprintf("//meta[translate(@%s,'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ','abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz')='%s']/@content", $attr, strtolower($value));
        $nodes = $xpath->query($q);
        if (!$nodes || $nodes->length === 0) {
            return null;
        }
        $content = $nodes->item(0)->nodeValue;
        return is_string($content) ? $content : null;
    }

    protected function queryTitle(\DOMXPath $xpath): ?string
    {
        $nodes = $xpath->query('//title');
        if (!$nodes || $nodes->length === 0) {
            return null;
        }
        $text = $nodes->item(0)->textContent ?? null;
        return is_string($text) ? $text : null;
    }

    protected function queryLinkRel(\DOMXPath $xpath, string $rel): ?string
    {
        $q = sprintf("//link[translate(@rel,'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ','abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz')='%s']/@href", strtolower($rel));
        $nodes = $xpath->query($q);
        if (!$nodes || $nodes->length === 0) {
            return null;
        }
        $href = $nodes->item(0)->nodeValue;
        return is_string($href) ? $href : null;
    }

    protected function firstNonEmpty(array $values): ?string
    {
        foreach ($values as $v) {
            if (is_string($v)) {
                $v = trim($v);
                if ($v !== '') {
                    return $v;
                }
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    protected function limitString(string $s, int $maxBytes): string
    {
        if (strlen($s) <= $maxBytes) {
            return $s;
        }
        return substr($s, 0, $maxBytes);
    }

    protected function extractFinalUrlFromHeaders(string $headersRaw): ?string
    {
        $lines = preg_split("/\r\n|\n|\r/", $headersRaw);
        if (!$lines) {
            return null;
        }

        $location = null;
        foreach ($lines as $line) {
            if (stripos($line, 'Location:') === 0) {
                $location = trim(substr($line, strlen('Location:')));
            }
        }

        return $location ?: null;
    }

    protected function absolutizeUrl(string $maybeRelative, string $baseUrl): string
    {
        if (preg_match('#^https?://#i', $maybeRelative)) {
            return $maybeRelative;
        }
        if (str_starts_with($maybeRelative, '//')) {
            $scheme = parse_url($baseUrl, PHP_URL_SCHEME) ?: 'https';
            return $scheme . ':' . $maybeRelative;
        }

        $p = parse_url($baseUrl);
        $scheme = $p['scheme'] ?? 'https';
        $host = $p['host'] ?? '';
        $port = isset($p['port']) ? ':' . $p['port'] : '';
        $basePath = $p['path'] ?? '/';

        $origin = $scheme . '://' . $host . $port;

        if (str_starts_with($maybeRelative, '/')) {
            return $origin . $maybeRelative;
        }

        $dir = rtrim(str_replace('\\', '/', dirname($basePath)), '/');
        if ($dir === '') {
            $dir = '';
        }

        return $origin . ($dir ? '/' . $dir : '') . '/' . $maybeRelative;
    }
}
